_meta.note: Expansión con namespace violation y status anidado para Gatekeeper

gatekeeper.title: Restricted Access
gatekeeper.subtitle: Institutional Verification Required
gatekeeper.disclaimer: This system is protected by sovereign-grade encryption. Unauthorized access attempts are logged and prosecuted.

status.custody_hold: CUSTODY HOLD: Asset Integrity Protocol Active
status.granted: Access granted. Redirecting to secure workspace.

violation.invalid_credential: Credential mismatch. The provided key does not match institutional records.
violation.integrity_failed: Integrity check failed. Custody protocol activated.
violation.unauthorized_jurisdiction: Access not permitted from current jurisdiction.
violation.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Temporary lockdown initiated.

status.granted: Acceso concedido. Redirigiendo a espacio seguro.
status.denied: Acceso denegado. Puntuación de integridad insuficiente.

violation.invalid_credential: Discrepancia de credenciales. La clave proporcionada no coincide con los registros institucionales.
violation.integrity_failed: Verificación de integridad fallida. Protocolo de custodia activado.
violation.unauthorized_jurisdiction: Acceso no permitido desde la jurisdicción actual.

status.granted: Acesso concedido. A redirecionar para espaço seguro.
status.denied: Acesso negado. Pontuação de integridade insuficiente.

violation.invalid_credential: Discrepância de credenciais. A chave fornecida não coincide com os registos institucionais.

gatekeeper.subtitle: Vérification Institutionnelle Requise
gatekeeper.disclaimer: Ce système est protégé par un chiffrement de grade souverain. Les tentatives d'accès non autorisées sont enregistrées et poursuivies.

status.custody_hold: GARDE À VUE FIDUCIAIRE: Protocole d'Intégrité des Actifs Actif

violation.invalid_credential: Incohérence d'identifiants. La clé fournie ne correspond pas aux registres institutionnels.

violation.unauthorized_jurisdiction: Accès non autorisé depuis la juridiction actuelle.
